interfaces.name: getHomeHighlights
interfaces.description: Get homepage highlight content including featured puppies, litters, stud dogs, events, and a short kennel summary.

interfaces.name: getAboutContent
interfaces.description: Get detailed About page content covering kennel history, mission, health standards, and show achievements with suggested action links.

target_page.description: Identifier of the target page, e.g., 'available_puppies', 'planned_litters', 'stud_dogs', 'show_schedule'

interfaces.name: getPuppiesAndLittersFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter option metadata for the Puppies & Planned Litters listing page, including sex, price ranges, placement types, sire title minimums, and expected colors.

parents_fully_health_tested_label.description: Label to show for the 'both parents fully health tested' filter toggle.

interfaces.name: listAvailablePuppies
interfaces.description: List available puppies with filters and sorting for the Puppies & Planned Litters page.

parameters.name: sex
parameters.description: Filter by sex: 'male', 'female', or 'either'

parameters.name: availability_start
parameters.description: ISO 8601 date or datetime string representing the start of availability window

parameters.name: availability_end
parameters.description: ISO 8601 date or datetime string representing the end of availability window

parameters.name: placement_type
parameters.description: e.g., 'pet_companion', 'show_prospect', 'performance_prospect', 'breeding_prospect'

parameters.name: sire_title_minimum
parameters.description: Minimum sire title level, e.g., 'none', 'ch', 'gch', 'bis'

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sorting mode: 'price_low_to_high', 'price_high_to_low', 'availability_date', 'age'

interfaces.name: listPlannedLitters
interfaces.description: List planned litters with filters for parents' health testing and expected colors.

parameters.name: parents_fully_health_tested
parameters.description: If true, only litters where both parents are fully health tested.

parameters.name: expected_color
parameters.description: Filter litters where expected_colors includes this value, e.g., 'black and tan'.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: e.g., 'availability_date', 'price_low_to_high'

interfaces.name: getPuppyDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific puppy, including litter and sire summaries and related puppies for suggestions.

parameters.name: puppyId
parameters.description: ID of the Puppy to load; typically comes from the current page URL or selection.

litter.description: Litter this puppy belongs to, if any.

interfaces.name: getLitterDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific litter, including parents and related litters.

parameters.name: litterId
parameters.description: ID of the Litter to load; typically comes from the current page URL or selection.

interfaces.name: reservePuppy
interfaces.description: Submit a reservation / hold request for a specific puppy from the puppy detail page.

parameters.name: puppyId
parameters.description: ID of the Puppy being reserved.

parameters.name: hold_option
parameters.description: Hold option: 'no_hold', 'hold_3_days', 'hold_7_days', or 'hold_until_pickup'.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Optional note to the kennel about this reservation.

interfaces.name: joinLitterWaitlist
interfaces.description: Submit a waitlist entry for a planned litter with preferred sex, placement type, budget, and notes.

parameters.name: litterId
parameters.description: ID of the Litter to join the waitlist for.

parameters.name: preferred_sex
parameters.description: Preferred sex: 'male', 'female', or 'either'.

parameters.name: placement_type
parameters.description: Placement type: 'pet_companion', 'show_prospect', 'performance_prospect', or 'breeding_prospect'.

parameters.name: notes
parameters.description: Additional preferences or notes for the kennel.

interfaces.name: getStudDogsFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Stud Dogs listing page.

interfaces.name: searchStudDogs
interfaces.description: Search stud dogs with filters for stud fee, hip score, DNA status, and sorting.

parameters.name: dna_status
parameters.description: e.g., 'any', 'clear', 'carrier', 'affected'

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: e.g., 'stud_fee_low_to_high', 'title_count_high_to_low', 'name_az'

interfaces.name: getStudDogsComparison
interfaces.description: Get comparison data for selected stud dogs to display side-by-side tables of titles, health tests, and stud fees.

parameters.name: studDogIds
parameters.description: Array of stud dog IDs selected for comparison.

interfaces.name: getStudDogDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific stud dog including titles, pedigree, health tests, stud fee, and related studs.

parameters.name: studDogId
parameters.description: ID of the StudDog to load; typically comes from the current page URL or selection.

interfaces.name: submitStudInquiry
interfaces.description: Submit a breeding inquiry or stud service request for a specific stud dog.

parameters.name: studDogId
parameters.description: ID of the StudDog being inquired about.

parameters.name: preferred_timeframe
parameters.description: Free-text timeframe description, e.g., 'within the next 6 months'.

interfaces.name: getTourBookingOptions
interfaces.description: Get available tour types and time-of-day options for the Visits & Tours booking form.

time_range.description: Optional human-readable range, e.g., '1 PM – 4 PM'.

interfaces.name: getAvailableTourSlots
interfaces.description: List available tour time slots for a given date range, tour type, and optional time-of-day filter.

parameters.name: tour_type
parameters.description: e.g., 'standard_kennel_tour', 'puppy_meet_and_greet', 'private_consultation'

parameters.name: date_start
parameters.description: Start date (inclusive) for searching slots, ISO 8601 date string.

parameters.name: date_end
parameters.description: End date (inclusive) for searching slots, ISO 8601 date string.

parameters.name: time_of_day
parameters.description: Filter by time of day: 'morning', 'afternoon', or 'evening'.

parameters.name: min_group_size
parameters.description: Optional minimum group size to ensure max_group_size can accommodate the party.

interfaces.name: bookTour
interfaces.description: Book a specific tour slot with group size and visitor contact information.

parameters.name: tour_slot_id
parameters.description: ID of the TourSlot being booked.

parameters.name: tour_type
parameters.description: Type of tour, e.g., 'standard_kennel_tour'.

interfaces.name: getEventsFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Events & Shows listing, including event types, categories, and sorting modes.

interfaces.name: searchEvents
interfaces.description: Search workshops and shows with filters for category, event type, date range, location, distance, kennel participation, and sorting.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: e.g., 'workshops' or 'shows'

parameters.name: event_type
parameters.description: e.g., 'handling_workshop', 'class', 'dog_show', 'other', 'any'

parameters.name: date_start
parameters.description: Start of date range (inclusive), ISO 8601 date string.

parameters.name: date_end
parameters.description: End of date range (inclusive), ISO 8601 date string.

parameters.name: zip
parameters.description: Base ZIP code for distance filter, e.g., '90001'.

parameters.name: distance_miles
parameters.description: Maximum distance in miles from the provided ZIP.

parameters.name: only_kennel_participating
parameters.description: If true, only return shows where the kennel has dogs entered.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: e.g., 'price_low_to_high', 'price_high_to_low', 'date_soonest', 'distance'

interfaces.name: getEventDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a specific event or show, including schedule, location, and workshop or show-specific actions.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: ID of the Event to load.

is_in_watchlist.description: True if this show is currently in the user's watchlist.

interfaces.name: registerForEvent
interfaces.description: Register for a workshop or class-type event, with participant details and payment method.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: ID of the Event to register for.

parameters.name: payment_method
parameters.description: e.g., 'pay_at_check_in', 'pay_later', 'credit_card', 'paypal', 'cash'

interfaces.name: addShowToWatchlist
interfaces.description: Add a dog show event to the user's tracked shows watchlist.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: ID of the dog show Event to add to the watchlist.

interfaces.name: removeShowFromWatchlist
interfaces.description: Remove a dog show event from the user's tracked shows watchlist.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: ID of the dog show Event to remove from the watchlist.

interfaces.name: getShowWatchlist
interfaces.description: Get the list of shows currently tracked in the user's watchlist, along with event details.

interfaces.name: getShopCategories
interfaces.description: Get list of product categories for the Shop/Store page such as Apparel and Leashes.

interfaces.name: getShopFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Shop, including rating and shipping filters.

parameters.name: category_slug
parameters.description: Optional category slug, e.g., 'apparel' or 'leashes', to tailor filter options.

interfaces.name: searchProducts
interfaces.description: Search products within a category using keyword, price, rating, free shipping, and sort filters.

parameters.name: category_slug
parameters.description: Product category slug, e.g., 'apparel' or 'leashes'.

parameters.name: search_query
parameters.description: Keyword search across product name/description.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: e.g., 'price_low_to_high', 'price_high_to_low', 'rating_high_to_low', 'newest'

interfaces.name: getProductDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a shop product including sizes, rating, and shipping information, plus related products.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: ID of the Product to load.

interfaces.name: addToCart
interfaces.description: Add a product to the shopping cart. Creates a cart if none exists and updates quantities if the same product/size already exists.

parameters.name: product_id
parameters.description: ID of the Product to add.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Optional size selection for apparel, e.g., 'xs', 's', 'm', 'l', 'xl', 'xxl'.

interfaces.name: getCart
interfaces.description: Get current cart details including items and totals for the Cart page and mini-cart display.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of a cart item and recalculate cart totals.

parameters.name: cart_item_id
parameters.description: ID of the CartItem to update.

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: New quantity. If set to 0, the item will be removed.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the cart and recalculate totals.

parameters.name: cart_item_id
parameters.description: ID of the CartItem to remove.

interfaces.name: getCheckoutSummary
interfaces.description: Get a checkout summary for the current cart, including items and totals, before collecting shipping and payment details.

interfaces.name: submitOrder
interfaces.description: Submit an order for the current cart with buyer information, shipping address, and payment method.

parameters.name: payment_method
parameters.description: e.g., 'pay_at_pickup', 'pay_at_check_in', 'pay_later', 'credit_card', 'paypal'

interfaces.name: getContactFormOptions
interfaces.description: Get options for the contact form including subject choices and preferred contact methods.

interfaces.name: submitContactMessage
interfaces.description: Submit a message through the main Contact form, optionally referencing a specific puppy and desired pickup date.

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: e.g., 'puppy_availability', 'general_question', 'stud_inquiry', 'other'

parameters.name: preferred_contact_method
parameters.description: e.g., 'email', 'phone'

parameters.name: related_puppy_id
parameters.description: Optional Puppy ID if asking about a specific puppy.

parameters.name: desired_pickup_date
parameters.description: Optional desired pickup date for the puppy, ISO 8601 date string.

interfaces.name: getRelatedPuppies
interfaces.description: Get a list of puppies related to the given puppy for use in 'You may also like' sections.

parameters.name: puppyId
parameters.description: Reference puppy ID to find related puppies.

interfaces.name: getRelatedLitters
interfaces.description: Get a list of litters related to the given litter for suggestions on the litter detail page.

parameters.name: litterId
parameters.description: Reference litter ID to find related litters.

interfaces.name: getRelatedStudDogs
interfaces.description: Get a list of stud dogs related to a given stud dog for cross-navigation on stud dog detail pages.

parameters.name: studDogId
parameters.description: Reference stud dog ID to find related studs.

interfaces.name: getRelatedProducts
interfaces.description: Get a list of products related to a given product for cross-selling on product detail pages.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: Reference product ID to find related products.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load the existing Cart from storage or create a new one if none exists, and return its ID.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recompute subtotal, shipping_total, and total for a Cart based on its CartItems.

helperFunctions.name: _getCurrentPuppiesListingFilterState
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to retrieve and persist the current Puppies & Planned Litters filter state using PuppiesListingFilter.

helperFunctions.name: _getCurrentStudListingFilterState
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to manage StudListingFilter state between Stud Dogs listing interactions.

helperFunctions.name: _getCurrentEventsListingFilterState
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to manage EventsListingFilter state for the Events & Shows pages, including watchlist view.

helperFunctions.name: _getCurrentShopListingFilterState
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to manage ShopListingFilter state for the Shop categories and product search.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateShowWatchlist
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or initialize the local ShowWatchlistItem collection for the single user.
